subcodes.title: Words to a believer, spoken on 1913-05-04
subcodes.first_line: When I sense the love and unity of the friends I gain health and fresh strength. I have heard that thou art speaking in the meetings
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @stories; anecdotes, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @power of prayer
